user.title: Voice Agent Router
user.description: Configure your LLM-powered voice agent router.

data_description.api_key: API key for the LLM provider (e.g., OpenRouter, OpenAI).
data_description.model: Model identifier to use for routing and responses.

abort.already_configured: Voice Agent Router is already configured.

data_description.model: Model identifier to use for routing and responses.
data_description.system_prompt: System prompt sent to the LLM with each conversation turn.
data_description.temperature: Sampling temperature (0.0 - 2.0). Lower is more deterministic.
data_description.max_tool_iterations: Maximum number of tool-call rounds per conversation turn.
data_description.enable_local_router: Use a local classifier to pre-route simple intents before calling the LLM.
data_description.send_bug_reports: Send anonymous error reports to help improve the integration. No personal data is collected.
